parameters.query: UPDATE screening_inbox SET claimed_by = $1, claimed_at = NOW() WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM screening_inbox WHERE trigger_kind IN ('blue_collar_new', 'blue_collar_reply') AND processed_at IS NULL AND (claimed_at IS NULL OR claimed_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes') ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED) RETURNING *
UPDATE screening_inbox SET error_message = $2 WHERE id = $1
SELECT * FROM blue_collar_screening WHERE application_id = $1
SELECT * FROM screening_scripts WHERE script_id = $1

value.systemPrompt: ={{ 'You are a normaliser for a structured HR screening system. You receive a candidate raw WhatsApp reply to a specific question and must return a single canonical value. Return ONLY the canonical value — no explanation, no punctuation, no extra text. If you cannot determine the answer, return the exact string: UNCLEAR' }}
value.messages:
={{ JSON.stringify([{ role: 'user', content: 'Question: ' + ($('Get Current Question').first()?.json?.currentQuestion?.prompt ?? '') + '
Expected answer type: ' + ($('Get Current Question').first()?.json?.currentQuestion?.type ?? '') + '
Valid values (if applicable): ' + JSON.stringify($('Get Current Question').first()?.json?.currentQuestion?.enum_values ?? 'yes/no') + '
Candidate reply: ' + ($('Extract Reply Text').first()?.json?.messageBody ?? '') + '

Return the canonical value.' }]) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE blue_collar_screening SET answers = answers || jsonb_build_object($2, $3::text), question_index = (question_index + 1), last_activity_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE application_id = $1 RETURNING question_index, (SELECT jsonb_array_length(ss.questions) FROM screening_scripts ss WHERE ss.script_id = blue_collar_screening.script_id) as total_questions, candidate_id, application_id, script_id, answers
UPDATE blue_collar_screening SET final_score = $2, strength_tier = $3, status = 'completed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE application_id = $1 RETURNING *

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Claim Inbox Row').first()?.json?.application_id ?? '', $('Compute Final Score').first()?.json?.finalScore ?? 0, $('Compute Final Score').first()?.json?.strengthTier ?? 'not_a_fit'] }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { query: 'mutation UpdateApplication($id: ID!, $score: Float!, $scoreBreakdown: String!, $status: String!) { updateApplication(id: $id, data: { score: $score, scoreBreakdown: $scoreBreakdown, status: $status }) { id } }', variables: { id: $('Claim Inbox Row').first()?.json?.application_id ?? '', score: $('Compute Final Score').first()?.json?.finalScore ?? 0, scoreBreakdown: JSON.stringify($('Compute Final Score').first()?.json?.breakdown ?? {}), status: 'screened' } } }}

={{ { query: 'mutation UpdateCandidate($id: ID!, $strengthTier: String!, $reEngagementEligible: Boolean!) { updateCandidate(id: $id, data: { strengthTier: $strengthTier, reEngagementEligible: $reEngagementEligible }) { id } }', variables: { id: $('Claim Inbox Row').first()?.json?.candidate_id ?? '', strengthTier: $('Compute Final Score').first()?.json?.strengthTier ?? 'not_a_fit', reEngagementEligible: $('Compute Final Score').first()?.json?.reEngagementEligible ?? false } } }}

={{ { query: 'mutation CreateReviewTask($applicationId: ID!, $kind: String!, $dueBy: DateTime!) { createReviewTask(data: { subjectApplication: { connect: { id: $applicationId } }, kind: $kind, dueBy: $dueBy, status: "OPEN" }) { id } }', variables: { applicationId: $('Claim Inbox Row').first()?.json?.application_id ?? '', kind: 'SCORE_REVIEW', dueBy: new Date(Date.now() + 4*60*60*1000).toISOString() } } }}

value.to: ={{ (() => { try { return $('Fetch Candidate Phone — Reply').first()?.json?.data?.candidate?.whatsappNumberE164; } catch(e) {} try { return $('Fetch Application from Twenty — Init').first()?.json?.data?.application?.candidate?.whatsappNumberE164; } catch(e) {} return ''; })() }}
value.body: ={{ 'Thank you for completing our screening! We have received all your answers and our team will be in touch with you soon. Good luck!' }}

parameters.query: UPDATE screening_inbox SET processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1

value.to: ={{ (() => { try { return $('Fetch Candidate Phone — Reply').first()?.json?.data?.candidate?.whatsappNumberE164; } catch(e) {} try { return $('Fetch Application from Twenty — Init').first()?.json?.data?.application?.candidate?.whatsappNumberE164; } catch(e) {} return ''; })() }}
value.body: ={{ (() => { const scriptRow = $('Fetch Screening Script').first()?.json ?? {}; const questions = scriptRow.questions ?? []; const nextIdx = $('Store Answer + Advance').first()?.json?.question_index ?? 0; const nextQ = questions[nextIdx]; return nextQ ? nextQ.prompt : ''; })() }}

parameters.query: UPDATE blue_collar_screening SET last_activity_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE application_id = $1
UPDATE screening_inbox SET processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1

value.to: ={{ (() => { try { return $('Fetch Candidate Phone — Reply').first()?.json?.data?.candidate?.whatsappNumberE164; } catch(e) {} try { return $('Fetch Application from Twenty — Init').first()?.json?.data?.application?.candidate?.whatsappNumberE164; } catch(e) {} return ''; })() }}
value.body: ={{ 'Sorry, I did not quite get that. ' + ($('Get Current Question').first()?.json?.currentQuestion?.prompt ?? '') }}

parameters.query: UPDATE blue_collar_screening SET last_activity_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE application_id = $1
UPDATE screening_inbox SET processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { query: 'query GetApplicationJobPosting($id: ID!) { application(filter: { id: { eq: $id } }) { id candidate { id whatsappNumberE164 } jobPosting { id category collarType } } }', variables: { id: $('Claim Inbox Row').first()?.json?.application_id ?? '' } } }}

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM screening_scripts WHERE script_id = $1 AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO blue_collar_screening (candidate_id, application_id, twenty_job_posting_id, script_id, question_index, answers, started_at, last_activity_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 0, '{}', NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (application_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING *

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Claim Inbox Row').first()?.json?.candidate_id ?? '', $('Claim Inbox Row').first()?.json?.application_id ?? '', $('Fetch Application from Twenty — Init').first()?.json?.data?.application?.jobPosting?.id ?? '', $('Fetch Init Script').first()?.json?.script_id ?? ''] }}

value.body: ={{ (() => { const scriptRow = $('Fetch Init Script').first()?.json ?? {}; const questions = scriptRow.questions ?? []; const q0 = questions[0]; return q0 ? ('Hi! We would like to ask you a few quick questions. ' + q0.prompt) : ''; })() }}

parameters.query: UPDATE screening_inbox SET processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1

parameters.key: ={{ 'hra:conv:' + ((() => { try { return $('Claim Inbox Row').first()?.json?.candidate_id; } catch(e) { return ''; } })() ?? '') }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_errors (workflow_name, execution_id, node_name, error_message, error_stack) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)

nodes.name: Fetch Blue Collar Applications from Twenty

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { query: 'query FindBlueCollarApplications { applications(filter: { AND: [{ status: { eq: "received" } }, { jobPosting: { collarType: { eq: "BLUE" } } }] }) { edges { node { id candidate { id } jobPosting { id category } } } } }' } }}

parameters.query: SELECT application_id FROM blue_collar_screening

INSERT INTO screening_inbox (candidate_id, application_id, trigger_kind, payload) VALUES ($1, $2, 'blue_collar_new', '{"source":"twenty_poll"}') ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uq_screening_inbox_candidate_active DO NOTHING
SELECT id, candidate_id, application_id FROM blue_collar_screening WHERE status = 'in_progress' AND last_activity_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND reminder_sent_at IS NULL

value.body: ={{ 'Hi! We noticed you have not completed your screening questions yet. We would love to hear from you. Please reply when you are ready.' }}

parameters.query: UPDATE blue_collar_screening SET reminder_sent_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
SELECT id, candidate_id, application_id FROM blue_collar_screening WHERE status = 'in_progress' AND last_activity_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours'
UPDATE blue_collar_screening SET status = 'withdrawn', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1 RETURNING candidate_id, application_id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { query: 'mutation WithdrawApplication($id: ID!) { updateApplication(id: $id, data: { status: "withdrawn" }) { id } }', variables: { id: $json.application_id ?? $('Fetch 72h Withdrawn Rows').item?.json?.application_id ?? '' } } }}

value.body: ={{ 'Hi! We noticed you have not completed your screening and we have had to close your application. You are welcome to apply again in the future.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { query: 'query GetCandidatePhone($id: ID!) { candidate(filter: { id: { eq: $id } }) { id whatsappNumberE164 } }', variables: { id: $('Claim Inbox Row').first()?.json?.candidate_id ?? '' } } }}
